title: Sovereign Enterprise Autoresearch Reactor
problem: Automated discovery is useful only when the system can generate hypotheses, test them, validate them, reject failures, combine branches, and remember what worked.
mission: Run parallel enterprise improvement threads: Domain Scouts identify opportunities, Hypothesis Engineers propose interventions, Builder Cells execute, Evaluator Operators test, Reviewers validate, Red Teams falsify, and the Selection Gate promotes only proven improvements.
incremental: Adds autonomous discovery and experimental search to the enterprise operating system.
value: Creates a repeatable machinery for finding improvements across corporate workflows, risk controls, security, procurement, compute, finance, and operations.
plans: Sovereign Enterprise Autoresearch Reactor proof mission plan
rsi: The accepted artifact may influence future work only after evidence, evaluator review, reviewer validation, scope control, challenge window, rollback readiness, Selection Gate approval, and Chronicle entry.
